name: MiniMax-VL-01
license: Custom MiniMax Model License (free for most use; platforms with >100M MAU must request a separate license; code under MIT)
archDisplay: Hybrid Lightning+Softmax Attention MoE (80 layers, 32 experts top-2) + 303M-param ViT/MLP vision encoder
note: Vision-language sibling of MiniMax-Text-01, adding a dynamic-resolution (336px-2016px) ViT+MLP encoder atop the same 456B hybrid-attention MoE backbone.

results.notes: From the same official evaluation table as the already-recorded MMMU score.
Reported out of 1000 on the official model card; MiniMax-VL-01's highest-scoring benchmark in its comparison table.
Listed as 'OlympiadBench (full)' in the card's Mathematics & Sciences section; slightly above the taxonomy's stated 0-22 range but is the same bilingual multimodal OlympiadBench evaluation.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real via HF model card (MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-VL-01) and GitHub MiniMax-AI/MiniMax-01. 456B/45.9B MoE backbone + 303M ViT-MLP vision encoder, dynamic resolution 336-2016px all confirmed. All 4 benchmark scores (MMMU 68.5, MathVista 68.6, DocVQA 96.4, ChartQA 91.7) confirmed literally on the HF card. Price ($0.2 input / $1.1 output per 1M tokens) independently confirmed via current MiniMax pricing pages. No changes needed.
